title: Agentic DevOps
description: Operate modern infrastructure with AI agents in the loop. You will progress through Infrastructure as Code (Terraform/Pulumi), declarative GitOps, AI coding assistants in CI/CD pipelines, copilot-assisted code review, policy-as-code with agent verification, observability for AI-augmented systems, agentic incident response, and prompt engineering for ops runbooks. By the end you will be able to design, ship, and operate platforms where humans and AI agents share the on-call rotation.

modules.title: Infrastructure as Code Foundations
modules.description: Provision cloud resources declaratively with Terraform and Pulumi. State management, modules, and the plan/apply lifecycle.
objectives: Explain why declarative provisioning beats imperative scripts
Author a Terraform module that creates a VPC, subnets, and a managed Postgres
Compare Terraform and Pulumi state and plan workflows
Detect and resolve a state drift scenario

modules.title: Declarative GitOps with Argo CD and Flux
modules.description: Adopt Git as the single source of truth for cluster state. Set up Argo CD or Flux to reconcile a Kubernetes namespace continuously.
objectives: Define GitOps and contrast push vs pull deployment models
Bootstrap an Argo CD or Flux instance against a Git repository
Promote a change from staging to production via a pull request
Diagnose a sync failure using the Argo CD or Flux CLI

modules.title: AI Coding Agents in CI Pipelines
modules.description: Embed coding agents into pull-request workflows. Generation, review, and self-healing checks that run before merge.
objectives: Identify safe boundaries for autonomous agent actions in CI
Wire a coding agent into a GitHub Actions or GitLab CI job
Cap agent token budgets and enforce cost ceilings per PR
Roll back an agent-authored commit and capture the failure mode

modules.title: Copilot-Assisted Code Review
modules.description: Use AI copilots to triage diffs, surface security smells, and propose refactors. Trust calibration and human-in-the-loop gates.
objectives: Configure a copilot review bot against a sample repository
Calibrate which copilot suggestions require human approval
Catch a hallucinated API call in a generated review comment
Measure review throughput before and after copilot adoption

modules.title: Policy as Code with AI Verification
modules.description: Encode security and compliance policies in OPA/Rego or Sentinel and have agents verify drift, exceptions, and exemptions.
objectives: Write an OPA Rego rule that blocks privileged pods
Run a policy check as a Conftest step in CI
Use an agent to propose a policy exception with justification
Audit policy exemptions and produce a compliance report

modules.title: Observability for AI-Augmented Systems
modules.description: Trace agent invocations end-to-end. Metrics, structured logs, and SLOs that account for non-deterministic LLM steps.
objectives: Instrument an agent workflow with OpenTelemetry spans
Design SLOs that include p95 LLM latency and token-cost ceilings
Detect a degraded prompt path from a tail-latency alert
Correlate an agent retry storm with a downstream rate limit

modules.title: Agentic Incident Response
modules.description: Agents as first responders: page triage, runbook execution, and human-handoff patterns when confidence drops.
objectives: Define confidence thresholds for autonomous remediation actions
Author a runbook that an agent can execute step-by-step
Capture an audit log of every agent action during an incident
Conduct a blameless postmortem covering both human and agent decisions

modules.title: Prompt Engineering for Ops Runbooks
modules.description: Write resilient prompts for operational tasks. Delimiters, refusal patterns, and red-team checks against prompt injection.
objectives: Structure an ops prompt with explicit role, scope, and refusal rules
Add few-shot examples that cover both success and refusal paths
Run a red-team check against an ops prompt and patch the vulnerability
Version and review ops prompts as code

modules.title: Capstone: Ship an Agent-Operated Platform
modules.description: Bring it together: IaC + GitOps + AI agents in CI + policy + observability + agentic incident response on a multi-tier sample app.
objectives: Provision a Kubernetes cluster with Terraform and bootstrap GitOps
Add an AI coding agent to the deployment pipeline with cost caps
Wire policy-as-code and observability with SLOs
Run an incident drill where an agent triages and escalates
